description: Sphere aligner is a component that has a list of child slots under ``Items`` and aligns those items into a spherical shape.

fields.AutoAddChildren: Controls whether slots below this component's slot in the hierarchy are automatically added to ``_targets``
fields.AutoAddIgnoreTags: Do not add slots to the list of children automatically if it's tag is contained in this list.
fields.Radius: The radius of the sphere to align items into
fields.DistributionOffset: Shift the positions of the items along the sphere surface, redistributes.
fields.AlignToNormal: Whether to rotate the items to align them to the surface of the sphere
fields.RotationOffset: How much to rotate the sphere of aligned items by their individual origins
fields.NormalizedStart: What point to start the alignment of items from top to bottom of the sphere.
fields.NormalizedEnd: What point to end the alignment of items from top to bottom of the sphere.
fields.HorizontalStart: What point to start the alignment of items along the equator of the sphere.
fields.HorizontalEnd: What point to end the alignment of items along the equator of the sphere.
fields.Items: A list of items to align into the sphere shape.
